subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon Carmel hath attained unto the presence of God, the Mighty, the All-Praised, and the Herald hath called out from every direction: "O Carmel, descend!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه فاز الکرمل بلقاء الله العزیز الحمید و نادی المناد من کل الجهات یا کرمل انزل
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @the concourse on high, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
